query:
INSERT INTO regions (code, name, isActive) VALUES 
('RYD', 'Riyadh Region', 1),
('MKK', 'Makkah Region', 1),
('MDN', 'Madinah Region', 1),
('EST', 'Eastern Province', 1),
('QSM', 'Al-Qassim Region', 1)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE name = VALUES(name);
